mapper.select: SELECT sfid FROM (WITH TO_CHECK (sfid) AS (VALUES ${ids}) SELECT tc.sfid, NOT EXISTS (SELECT sfid FROM accountsync p WHERE p.sfid = tc.sfid) AS checked FROM to_check tc ) AS t WHERE t.checked = #{checked}

SELECT p.sfid, p.appcompany, p.affiliationstorenamealphabetic, p.affiliationstorenamekana, p.affiliationstorenamekanji, p.website, p.keiri_no as keirino, p.corporate_number as corporatenumber, p.mertermno, p.iris_id as irisid, p.merchantinfo_isrepresentative as merchantinfoisrepresentative, p.merchantinfo_inquiryname as merchantinfoinquiryname, p.merchantinfo_inquiryphone as merchantinfoinquiryphone, p.merchantinfo_warningemail as merchantinfowarningemail, p.merchantinfo_inquiryemail as merchantinfoinquiryemail, p.merchantinfo_errorinquiryname as merchantinfoerrorinquiryname, p.merchantinfo_errorinquiryphone as merchantinfoerrorinquiryphone, p.merchantinfo_errorinquiryemail as merchantinfoerrorinquiryemail, p.merchantinfo_erroraccountbank as merchantinfoerroraccountbank, p.merchantinfo_erroraccountbranch as merchantinfoerroraccountbranch, p.merchantinfo_erroraccounttype as merchantinfoerroraccounttype, p.merchantinfo_erroraccountnumber as merchantinfoerroraccountnumber, p.merchantinfo_erroraccountname as merchantinfoerroraccountname, p.merchantinfo_erroraccountkana as merchantinfoerroraccountkana, p.merchantinfo_serviceid as merchantinfoserviceid, p.merchantinfo_paymentcontactname as merchantinfopaymentcontactname, p.merchantinfo_remarks as merchantinforemarks, p.merchantinfo_radename as merchantinforadename, p.merchantinfo_postalcode as merchantinfopostalcode, p.merchantinfo_prefecturecode as merchantinfoprefecturecode, p.merchantinfo_address as merchantinfoaddress, p.merchantinfo_addresskana as merchantinfoaddresskana, p.merchantinfo_phonenumberhyphen as merchantinfophonenumberhyphen, p.merchantinfo_contactname as merchantinfocontactname, p.merchantinfo_contactemail as merchantinfocontactemail, p.merchantinfo_meterlist as merchantinfometerlist, p.merchantcontrinfor_applicationcars as merchantcontrinforapplicationcars, p.merchantcontrinfor_tabletmodel as merchantcontrinfortabletmodel, p.merchantcontrinfor_applicationdate as merchantcontrinforapplicationdate, p.merchantcontrinfor_isfacetofacesettlement as merchantcontrinforisfacetofacesettlement, p.merchantcontrinfor_isregistry as merchantcontrinforisregistry, p.merchantcontrinfor_licensename as merchantcontrinforlicensename, p.merchantcontrinfor_licensenumber as merchantcontrinforlicensenumber, p.merchantcontrinfor_licenseacquisitiondate as merchantcontrinforlicenseacquisitiondate, p.merchantreprinfor_fullnamekanji as merchantreprinforfullnamekanji, p.merchantreprinfor_fullnamekana as merchantreprinforfullnamekana, p.merchantreprinfor_postalcode as merchantreprinforpostalcode, p.merchantreprinfor_prefecturecode as merchantreprinforprefecturecode, p.merchantreprinfor_address as merchantreprinforaddress, p.merchantreprinfor_phone as merchantreprinforphone, p.merchantreprinfor_birthday as merchantreprinforbirthday, p.merchantreprinfor_sex as merchantreprinforsex, p.merchantreprinfor_memo as merchantreprinformemo, p.merchantstoreinfor_storenamekanji as merchantstoreinforstorenamekanji, p.merchantstoreinfor_storenamehalfwidthkana as merchantstoreinforstorenamehalfwidthkana, p.merchantstoreinfor_storenamealphabet as merchantstoreinforstorenamealphabet, p.merchantstoreinfor_postalcode as merchantstoreinforpostalcode, p.merchantstoreinfor_prefecturecode as merchantstoreinforprefecturecode, p.merchantstoreinfor_address as merchantstoreinforaddress, p.merchantstoreinfor_addresskana as merchantstoreinforaddresskana, p.merchantstoreinfor_phone as merchantstoreinforphone, p.merchantstoreinfor_memo as merchantstoreinformemo, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_date as merchantdeliveryinfordate, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_gakkencustomernumber as merchantdeliveryinforgakkencustomernumber, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_name as merchantdeliveryinforname, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_postalcode as merchantdeliveryinforpostalcode, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_prefecturecode as merchantdeliveryinforprefecturecode, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_address as merchantdeliveryinforaddress, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_contactname as merchantdeliveryinforcontactname, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_phone as merchantdeliveryinforphone, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_memo as merchantdeliveryinformemo, p.merchantpayinfo_netbankaccount as merchantpayinfonetbankaccount, p.merchantpayinfo_itabbankaccount as merchantpayinfoitabbankaccount, p.merchantpayinfo_name as merchantpayinfoname, p.merchantpayinfo_postalcode as merchantpayinfopostalcode, p.merchantpayinfo_address1 as merchantpayinfoaddress1, p.merchantpayinfo_address2 as merchantpayinfoaddress2, p.merchantpayinfo_contactname as merchantpayinfocontactname, p.merchantoperinfor_startdate as merchantoperinforstartdate, p.merchantoperinfor_acceptancedate as merchantoperinforacceptancedate, p.merchantoperinfor_guaranteeenddate as merchantoperinforguaranteeenddate, p.merchantoperinfor_contractenddate as merchantoperinforcontractenddate, p.merchantoperinfor_memo as merchantoperinformemo, p.invaliddate, p.invalidreason, p.invaliddetailreason, p.lastmodifieddate, p.appcompanyid, p.jpporganizationid FROM account p WHERE(date_trunc('second',p.lastmodifieddate) >=${startTime}) ORDER BY p.sfid DESC OFFSET ${offset} LIMIT ${limit}

SELECT p.sfid, p.appcompany, p.appcompanyid, p.jpporganizationid, p.affiliationstorenamealphabetic, p.affiliationstorenamekana, p.affiliationstorenamekanji, p.website, p.keiri_no as keirino, p.corporate_number as corporatenumber, p.mertermno, p.iris_id as irisid, p.merchantinfo_isrepresentative as merchantinfoisrepresentative, p.merchantinfo_inquiryname as merchantinfoinquiryname, p.merchantinfo_inquiryphone as merchantinfoinquiryphone, p.merchantinfo_warningemail as merchantinfowarningemail, p.merchantinfo_inquiryemail as merchantinfoinquiryemail, p.merchantinfo_errorinquiryname as merchantinfoerrorinquiryname, p.merchantinfo_errorinquiryphone as merchantinfoerrorinquiryphone, p.merchantinfo_errorinquiryemail as merchantinfoerrorinquiryemail, p.merchantinfo_erroraccountbank as merchantinfoerroraccountbank, p.merchantinfo_erroraccountbranch as merchantinfoerroraccountbranch, p.merchantinfo_erroraccounttype as merchantinfoerroraccounttype, p.merchantinfo_erroraccountnumber as merchantinfoerroraccountnumber, p.merchantinfo_erroraccountname as merchantinfoerroraccountname, p.merchantinfo_erroraccountkana as merchantinfoerroraccountkana, p.merchantinfo_serviceid as merchantinfoserviceid, p.merchantinfo_paymentcontactname as merchantinfopaymentcontactname, p.merchantinfo_remarks as merchantinforemarks, p.merchantinfo_radename as merchantinforadename, p.merchantinfo_postalcode as merchantinfopostalcode, p.merchantinfo_prefecturecode as merchantinfoprefecturecode, p.merchantinfo_address as merchantinfoaddress, p.merchantinfo_addresskana as merchantinfoaddresskana, p.merchantinfo_phonenumberhyphen as merchantinfophonenumberhyphen, p.merchantinfo_contactname as merchantinfocontactname, p.merchantinfo_contactemail as merchantinfocontactemail, p.merchantinfo_meterlist as merchantinfometerlist, p.merchantcontrinfor_applicationcars as merchantcontrinforapplicationcars, p.merchantcontrinfor_tabletmodel as merchantcontrinfortabletmodel, p.merchantcontrinfor_applicationdate as merchantcontrinforapplicationdate, p.merchantcontrinfor_isfacetofacesettlement as merchantcontrinforisfacetofacesettlement, p.merchantcontrinfor_isregistry as merchantcontrinforisregistry, p.merchantcontrinfor_licensename as merchantcontrinforlicensename, p.merchantcontrinfor_licensenumber as merchantcontrinforlicensenumber, p.merchantcontrinfor_licenseacquisitiondate as merchantcontrinforlicenseacquisitiondate, p.merchantreprinfor_fullnamekanji as merchantreprinforfullnamekanji, p.merchantreprinfor_fullnamekana as merchantreprinforfullnamekana, p.merchantreprinfor_postalcode as merchantreprinforpostalcode, p.merchantreprinfor_prefecturecode as merchantreprinforprefecturecode, p.merchantreprinfor_address as merchantreprinforaddress, p.merchantreprinfor_phone as merchantreprinforphone, p.merchantreprinfor_birthday as merchantreprinforbirthday, p.merchantreprinfor_sex as merchantreprinforsex, p.merchantreprinfor_memo as merchantreprinformemo, p.merchantstoreinfor_storenamekanji as merchantstoreinforstorenamekanji, p.merchantstoreinfor_storenamehalfwidthkana as merchantstoreinforstorenamehalfwidthkana, p.merchantstoreinfor_storenamealphabet as merchantstoreinforstorenamealphabet, p.merchantstoreinfor_postalcode as merchantstoreinforpostalcode, p.merchantstoreinfor_prefecturecode as merchantstoreinforprefecturecode, p.merchantstoreinfor_address as merchantstoreinforaddress, p.merchantstoreinfor_addresskana as merchantstoreinforaddresskana, p.merchantstoreinfor_phone as merchantstoreinforphone, p.merchantstoreinfor_memo as merchantstoreinformemo, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_date as merchantdeliveryinfordate, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_gakkencustomernumber as merchantdeliveryinforgakkencustomernumber, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_name as merchantdeliveryinforname, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_postalcode as merchantdeliveryinforpostalcode, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_prefecturecode as merchantdeliveryinforprefecturecode, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_address as merchantdeliveryinforaddress, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_contactname as merchantdeliveryinforcontactname, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_phone as merchantdeliveryinforphone, p.merchantdeliveryinfor_memo as merchantdeliveryinformemo, p.merchantpayinfo_netbankaccount as merchantpayinfonetbankaccount, p.merchantpayinfo_itabbankaccount as merchantpayinfoitabbankaccount, p.merchantpayinfo_name as merchantpayinfoname, p.merchantpayinfo_postalcode as merchantpayinfopostalcode, p.merchantpayinfo_address1 as merchantpayinfoaddress1, p.merchantpayinfo_address2 as merchantpayinfoaddress2, p.merchantpayinfo_contactname as merchantpayinfocontactname, p.merchantoperinfor_startdate as merchantoperinforstartdate, p.merchantoperinfor_acceptancedate as merchantoperinforacceptancedate, p.merchantoperinfor_guaranteeenddate as merchantoperinforguaranteeenddate, p.merchantoperinfor_contractenddate as merchantoperinforcontractenddate, p.merchantoperinfor_memo as merchantoperinformemo, p.invaliddate, p.invalidreason, p.invaliddetailreason FROM accountsync p WHERE p.sfid IN (${ids}) ORDER BY p.sfid DESC
SELECT count(p.sfid) AS rows FROM account p WHERE (date_trunc('second', p.lastmodifieddate) >= ${startTime})

SELECT a.sfid, a.appcompany, a.affiliationstorenamealphabetic, a.affiliationstorenamekana, a.affiliationstorenamekanji, a.website, a.keiri_no, a.corporate_number, a.mertermno, a.iris_id, a.merchantinfo_isrepresentative, a.merchantinfo_inquiryname, a.merchantinfo_inquiryphone, a.merchantinfo_warningemail, a.merchantinfo_inquiryemail, a.merchantinfo_errorinquiryname, a.merchantinfo_errorinquiryphone, a.merchantinfo_errorinquiryemail, a.merchantinfo_erroraccountbank, a.merchantinfo_erroraccountbranch, a.merchantinfo_erroraccounttype, a.merchantinfo_erroraccountnumber, a.merchantinfo_erroraccountname, a.merchantinfo_erroraccountkana, a.merchantinfo_serviceid, a.merchantinfo_paymentcontactname, a.merchantinfo_remarks, a.merchantinfo_radename, a.merchantinfo_postalcode, a.merchantinfo_prefecturecode, a.merchantinfo_address, a.merchantinfo_addresskana, a.merchantinfo_phonenumberhyphen, a.merchantinfo_contactname, a.merchantinfo_contactemail, a.merchantinfo_meterlist, a.merchantcontrinfor_applicationcars, a.merchantcontrinfor_tabletmodel, a.merchantcontrinfor_applicationdate, a.merchantcontrinfor_isfacetofacesettlement, a.merchantcontrinfor_isregistry, a.merchantcontrinfor_licensename, a.merchantcontrinfor_licensenumber, a.merchantcontrinfor_licenseacquisitiondate, a.merchantreprinfor_fullnamekanji, a.merchantreprinfor_fullnamekana, a.merchantreprinfor_postalcode, a.merchantreprinfor_prefecturecode, a.merchantreprinfor_address, a.merchantreprinfor_phone, a.merchantreprinfor_birthday, a.merchantreprinfor_sex, a.merchantreprinfor_memo, a.merchantstoreinfor_storenamekanji, a.merchantstoreinfor_storenamehalfwidthkana, a.merchantstoreinfor_storenamealphabet, a.merchantstoreinfor_postalcode, a.merchantstoreinfor_prefecturecode, a.merchantstoreinfor_address, a.merchantstoreinfor_addresskana, a.merchantstoreinfor_phone, a.merchantstoreinfor_memo, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_date, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_gakkencustomernumber, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_name, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_postalcode, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_prefecturecode, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_address, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_contactname, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_phone, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_memo, a.merchantpayinfo_netbankaccount, a.merchantpayinfo_itabbankaccount, a.merchantpayinfo_name, a.merchantpayinfo_postalcode, a.merchantpayinfo_address1, a.merchantpayinfo_address2, a.merchantpayinfo_contactname, a.merchantoperinfor_startdate, a.merchantoperinfor_acceptancedate, a.merchantoperinfor_guaranteeenddate, a.merchantoperinfor_contractenddate, a.merchantoperinfor_memo, a.invaliddate, a.invalidreason, a.invaliddetailreason, a.lastmodifieddate, a.appcompanyid, a.jpporganizationid FROM account a WHERE a.sfid=#{id}
SELECT a.sfid FROM account a WHERE a.sfid IN (${ids}) ORDER BY a.sfid DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account (sfid, appcompany, affiliationstorenamealphabetic, affiliationstorenamekana, affiliationstorenamekanji, website, keiri_no, corporate_number, mertermno, iris_id, merchantinfo_isrepresentative, merchantinfo_inquiryname, merchantinfo_inquiryphone, merchantinfo_warningemail, merchantinfo_inquiryemail, merchantinfo_errorinquiryname, merchantinfo_errorinquiryphone, merchantinfo_errorinquiryemail, merchantinfo_erroraccountbank, merchantinfo_erroraccountbranch, merchantinfo_erroraccounttype, merchantinfo_erroraccountnumber, merchantinfo_erroraccountname, merchantinfo_erroraccountkana, merchantinfo_serviceid, merchantinfo_paymentcontactname, merchantinfo_remarks, merchantinfo_radename, merchantinfo_postalcode, merchantinfo_prefecturecode, merchantinfo_address, merchantinfo_addresskana, merchantinfo_phonenumberhyphen, merchantinfo_contactname, merchantinfo_contactemail, merchantinfo_meterlist, merchantcontrinfor_applicationcars, merchantcontrinfor_tabletmodel, merchantcontrinfor_applicationdate, merchantcontrinfor_isfacetofacesettlement, merchantcontrinfor_isregistry, merchantcontrinfor_licensename, merchantcontrinfor_licensenumber, merchantcontrinfor_licenseacquisitiondate, merchantreprinfor_fullnamekanji, merchantreprinfor_fullnamekana, merchantreprinfor_postalcode, merchantreprinfor_prefecturecode, merchantreprinfor_address, merchantreprinfor_phone, merchantreprinfor_birthday, merchantreprinfor_sex, merchantreprinfor_memo, merchantstoreinfor_storenamekanji, merchantstoreinfor_storenamehalfwidthkana, merchantstoreinfor_storenamealphabet, merchantstoreinfor_postalcode, merchantstoreinfor_prefecturecode, merchantstoreinfor_address, merchantstoreinfor_addresskana, merchantstoreinfor_phone, merchantstoreinfor_memo, merchantdeliveryinfor_date, merchantdeliveryinfor_gakkencustomernumber, merchantdeliveryinfor_name, merchantdeliveryinfor_postalcode, merchantdeliveryinfor_prefecturecode, merchantdeliveryinfor_address, merchantdeliveryinfor_contactname, merchantdeliveryinfor_phone, merchantdeliveryinfor_memo, merchantpayinfo_netbankaccount, merchantpayinfo_itabbankaccount, merchantpayinfo_name, merchantpayinfo_postalcode, merchantpayinfo_address1, merchantpayinfo_address2, merchantpayinfo_contactname, merchantoperinfor_startdate, merchantoperinfor_acceptancedate, merchantoperinfor_guaranteeenddate, merchantoperinfor_contractenddate, merchantoperinfor_memo, invaliddate, invalidreason, invaliddetailreason, lastmodifieddate, appcompanyid, jpporganizationid) VALUES(#{sfid}, #{appcompany}, #{affiliationstorenamealphabetic}, #{affiliationstorenamekana}, #{affiliationstorenamekanji}, #{website}, #{keirino}, #{corporatenumber}, #{mertermno}, #{irisid}, ${merchantinfoisrepresentative==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{merchantinfoinquiryname}, #{merchantinfoinquiryphone}, #{merchantinfowarningemail}, #{merchantinfoinquiryemail}, #{merchantinfoerrorinquiryname}, #{merchantinfoerrorinquiryphone}, #{merchantinfoerrorinquiryemail}, #{merchantinfoerroraccountbank}, #{merchantinfoerroraccountbranch}, #{merchantinfoerroraccounttype}, #{merchantinfoerroraccountnumber}, #{merchantinfoerroraccountname}, #{merchantinfoerroraccountkana}, #{merchantinfoserviceid}, #{merchantinfopaymentcontactname}, #{merchantinforemarks}, #{merchantinforadename}, #{merchantinfopostalcode}, #{merchantinfoprefecturecode}, #{merchantinfoaddress}, #{merchantinfoaddresskana}, #{merchantinfophonenumberhyphen}, #{merchantinfocontactname}, #{merchantinfocontactemail}, #{merchantinfometerlist}, #{merchantcontrinforapplicationcars}, #{merchantcontrinfortabletmodel}, #{merchantcontrinforapplicationdate}, ${merchantcontrinforisfacetofacesettlement==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${merchantcontrinforisregistry==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{merchantcontrinforlicensename}, #{merchantcontrinforlicensenumber}, #{merchantcontrinforlicenseacquisitiondate}, #{merchantreprinforfullnamekanji}, #{merchantreprinforfullnamekana}, #{merchantreprinforpostalcode}, #{merchantreprinforprefecturecode}, #{merchantreprinforaddress}, #{merchantreprinforphone}, #{merchantreprinforbirthday}, #{merchantreprinforsex}, #{merchantreprinformemo}, #{merchantstoreinforstorenamekanji}, #{merchantstoreinforstorenamehalfwidthkana}, #{merchantstoreinforstorenamealphabet}, #{merchantstoreinforpostalcode}, #{merchantstoreinforprefecturecode}, #{merchantstoreinforaddress}, #{merchantstoreinforaddresskana}, #{merchantstoreinforphone}, #{merchantstoreinformemo}, #{merchantdeliveryinfordate}, #{merchantdeliveryinforgakkencustomernumber}, #{merchantdeliveryinforname}, #{merchantdeliveryinforpostalcode}, #{merchantdeliveryinforprefecturecode}, #{merchantdeliveryinforaddress}, #{merchantdeliveryinforcontactname}, #{merchantdeliveryinforphone}, #{merchantdeliveryinformemo}, #{merchantpayinfonetbankaccount}, #{merchantpayinfoitabbankaccount}, #{merchantpayinfoname}, #{merchantpayinfopostalcode}, #{merchantpayinfoaddress1}, #{merchantpayinfoaddress2}, #{merchantpayinfocontactname}, #{merchantoperinforstartdate}, #{merchantoperinforacceptancedate}, #{merchantoperinforguaranteeenddate}, #{merchantoperinforcontractenddate}, #{merchantoperinformemo}, #{invaliddate}, #{invalidreason}, #{invaliddetailreason}, #{lastmodifieddate}, #{appcompanyid}, #{jpporganizationid})
mapper.update: UPDATE account SET appcompany=#{appcompany}, affiliationstorenamealphabetic=#{affiliationstorenamealphabetic}, affiliationstorenamekana=#{affiliationstorenamekana}, affiliationstorenamekanji=#{affiliationstorenamekanji}, website=#{website}, keiri_no=#{keirino}, corporate_number=#{corporatenumber}, mertermno=#{mertermno}, iris_id=#{irisid}, merchantinfo_isrepresentative=${merchantinfoisrepresentative==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, merchantinfo_inquiryname=#{merchantinfoinquiryname}, merchantinfo_inquiryphone=#{merchantinfoinquiryphone}, merchantinfo_warningemail=#{merchantinfowarningemail}, merchantinfo_inquiryemail=#{merchantinfoinquiryemail}, merchantinfo_errorinquiryname=#{merchantinfoerrorinquiryname}, merchantinfo_errorinquiryphone=#{merchantinfoerrorinquiryphone}, merchantinfo_errorinquiryemail=#{merchantinfoerrorinquiryemail}, merchantinfo_erroraccountbank=#{merchantinfoerroraccountbank}, merchantinfo_erroraccountbranch=#{merchantinfoerroraccountbranch}, merchantinfo_erroraccounttype=#{merchantinfoerroraccounttype}, merchantinfo_erroraccountnumber=#{merchantinfoerroraccountnumber}, merchantinfo_erroraccountname=#{merchantinfoerroraccountname}, merchantinfo_erroraccountkana=#{merchantinfoerroraccountkana}, merchantinfo_serviceid=#{merchantinfoserviceid}, merchantinfo_paymentcontactname=#{merchantinfopaymentcontactname}, merchantinfo_remarks=#{merchantinforemarks}, merchantinfo_radename=#{merchantinforadename}, merchantinfo_postalcode=#{merchantinfopostalcode}, merchantinfo_prefecturecode=#{merchantinfoprefecturecode}, merchantinfo_address=#{merchantinfoaddress}, merchantinfo_addresskana=#{merchantinfoaddresskana}, merchantinfo_phonenumberhyphen=#{merchantinfophonenumberhyphen}, merchantinfo_contactname=#{merchantinfocontactname}, merchantinfo_contactemail=#{merchantinfocontactemail}, merchantinfo_meterlist=#{merchantinfometerlist}, merchantcontrinfor_applicationcars=#{merchantcontrinforapplicationcars}, merchantcontrinfor_tabletmodel=#{merchantcontrinfortabletmodel}, merchantcontrinfor_applicationdate=#{merchantcontrinforapplicationdate}, merchantcontrinfor_isfacetofacesettlement=${merchantcontrinforisfacetofacesettlement==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, merchantcontrinfor_isregistry=${merchantcontrinforisregistry==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, merchantcontrinfor_licensename=#{merchantcontrinforlicensename}, merchantcontrinfor_licensenumber=#{merchantcontrinforlicensenumber}, merchantcontrinfor_licenseacquisitiondate=#{merchantcontrinforlicenseacquisitiondate}, merchantreprinfor_fullnamekanji=#{merchantreprinforfullnamekanji}, merchantreprinfor_fullnamekana=#{merchantreprinforfullnamekana}, merchantreprinfor_postalcode=#{merchantreprinforpostalcode}, merchantreprinfor_prefecturecode=#{merchantreprinforprefecturecode}, merchantreprinfor_address=#{merchantreprinforaddress}, merchantreprinfor_phone=#{merchantreprinforphone}, merchantreprinfor_birthday=#{merchantreprinforbirthday}, merchantreprinfor_sex=#{merchantreprinforsex}, merchantreprinfor_memo=#{merchantreprinformemo}, merchantstoreinfor_storenamekanji=#{merchantstoreinforstorenamekanji}, merchantstoreinfor_storenamehalfwidthkana=#{merchantstoreinforstorenamehalfwidthkana}, merchantstoreinfor_storenamealphabet=#{merchantstoreinforstorenamealphabet}, merchantstoreinfor_postalcode=#{merchantstoreinforpostalcode}, merchantstoreinfor_prefecturecode=#{merchantstoreinforprefecturecode}, merchantstoreinfor_address=#{merchantstoreinforaddress}, merchantstoreinfor_addresskana=#{merchantstoreinforaddresskana}, merchantstoreinfor_phone=#{merchantstoreinforphone}, merchantstoreinfor_memo=#{merchantstoreinformemo}, merchantdeliveryinfor_date=#{merchantdeliveryinfordate}, merchantdeliveryinfor_gakkencustomernumber=#{merchantdeliveryinforgakkencustomernumber}, merchantdeliveryinfor_name=#{merchantdeliveryinforname}, merchantdeliveryinfor_postalcode=#{merchantdeliveryinforpostalcode}, merchantdeliveryinfor_prefecturecode=#{merchantdeliveryinforprefecturecode}, merchantdeliveryinfor_address=#{merchantdeliveryinforaddress}, merchantdeliveryinfor_contactname=#{merchantdeliveryinforcontactname}, merchantdeliveryinfor_phone=#{merchantdeliveryinforphone}, merchantdeliveryinfor_memo=#{merchantdeliveryinformemo}, merchantpayinfo_netbankaccount=#{merchantpayinfonetbankaccount}, merchantpayinfo_itabbankaccount=#{merchantpayinfoitabbankaccount}, merchantpayinfo_name=#{merchantpayinfoname}, merchantpayinfo_postalcode=#{merchantpayinfopostalcode}, merchantpayinfo_address1=#{merchantpayinfoaddress1}, merchantpayinfo_address2=#{merchantpayinfoaddress2}, merchantpayinfo_contactname=#{merchantpayinfocontactname}, merchantoperinfor_startdate=#{merchantoperinforstartdate}, merchantoperinfor_acceptancedate=#{merchantoperinforacceptancedate}, merchantoperinfor_guaranteeenddate=#{merchantoperinforguaranteeenddate}, merchantoperinfor_contractenddate=#{merchantoperinforcontractenddate}, merchantoperinfor_memo=#{merchantoperinformemo}, invaliddate=#{invaliddate}, invalidreason=#{invalidreason}, invaliddetailreason=#{invaliddetailreason}, lastmodifieddate=#{lastmodifieddate}, appcompanyid=#{appcompanyid}, jpporganizationid=#{jpporganizationid} WHERE sfid=#{sfid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO accountsync (sfid, appcompany, affiliationstorenamealphabetic, affiliationstorenamekana, affiliationstorenamekanji, website, keiri_no, corporate_number, mertermno, iris_id, merchantinfo_isrepresentative, merchantinfo_inquiryname, merchantinfo_inquiryphone, merchantinfo_warningemail, merchantinfo_inquiryemail, merchantinfo_errorinquiryname, merchantinfo_errorinquiryphone, merchantinfo_errorinquiryemail, merchantinfo_erroraccountbank, merchantinfo_erroraccountbranch, merchantinfo_erroraccounttype, merchantinfo_erroraccountnumber, merchantinfo_erroraccountname, merchantinfo_erroraccountkana, merchantinfo_serviceid, merchantinfo_paymentcontactname, merchantinfo_remarks, merchantinfo_radename, merchantinfo_postalcode, merchantinfo_prefecturecode, merchantinfo_address, merchantinfo_addresskana, merchantinfo_phonenumberhyphen, merchantinfo_contactname, merchantinfo_contactemail, merchantinfo_meterlist, merchantcontrinfor_applicationcars, merchantcontrinfor_tabletmodel, merchantcontrinfor_applicationdate, merchantcontrinfor_isfacetofacesettlement, merchantcontrinfor_isregistry, merchantcontrinfor_licensename, merchantcontrinfor_licensenumber, merchantcontrinfor_licenseacquisitiondate, merchantreprinfor_fullnamekanji, merchantreprinfor_fullnamekana, merchantreprinfor_postalcode, merchantreprinfor_prefecturecode, merchantreprinfor_address, merchantreprinfor_phone, merchantreprinfor_birthday, merchantreprinfor_sex, merchantreprinfor_memo, merchantstoreinfor_storenamekanji, merchantstoreinfor_storenamehalfwidthkana, merchantstoreinfor_storenamealphabet, merchantstoreinfor_postalcode, merchantstoreinfor_prefecturecode, merchantstoreinfor_address, merchantstoreinfor_addresskana, merchantstoreinfor_phone, merchantstoreinfor_memo, merchantdeliveryinfor_date, merchantdeliveryinfor_gakkencustomernumber, merchantdeliveryinfor_name, merchantdeliveryinfor_postalcode, merchantdeliveryinfor_prefecturecode, merchantdeliveryinfor_address, merchantdeliveryinfor_contactname, merchantdeliveryinfor_phone, merchantdeliveryinfor_memo, merchantpayinfo_netbankaccount, merchantpayinfo_itabbankaccount, merchantpayinfo_name, merchantpayinfo_postalcode, merchantpayinfo_address1, merchantpayinfo_address2, merchantpayinfo_contactname, merchantoperinfor_startdate, merchantoperinfor_acceptancedate, merchantoperinfor_guaranteeenddate, merchantoperinfor_contractenddate, merchantoperinfor_memo, invaliddate, invalidreason, invaliddetailreason, syncedtime, appcompanyid, jpporganizationid) VALUES(#{sfid}, #{appcompany}, #{affiliationstorenamealphabetic}, #{affiliationstorenamekana}, #{affiliationstorenamekanji}, #{website}, #{keirino}, #{corporatenumber}, #{mertermno}, #{irisid}, ${merchantinfoisrepresentative==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{merchantinfoinquiryname}, #{merchantinfoinquiryphone}, #{merchantinfowarningemail}, #{merchantinfoinquiryemail}, #{merchantinfoerrorinquiryname}, #{merchantinfoerrorinquiryphone}, #{merchantinfoerrorinquiryemail}, #{merchantinfoerroraccountbank}, #{merchantinfoerroraccountbranch}, #{merchantinfoerroraccounttype}, #{merchantinfoerroraccountnumber}, #{merchantinfoerroraccountname}, #{merchantinfoerroraccountkana}, #{merchantinfoserviceid}, #{merchantinfopaymentcontactname}, #{merchantinforemarks}, #{merchantinforadename}, #{merchantinfopostalcode}, #{merchantinfoprefecturecode}, #{merchantinfoaddress}, #{merchantinfoaddresskana}, #{merchantinfophonenumberhyphen}, #{merchantinfocontactname}, #{merchantinfocontactemail}, #{merchantinfometerlist}, #{merchantcontrinforapplicationcars}, #{merchantcontrinfortabletmodel}, #{merchantcontrinforapplicationdate}, ${merchantcontrinforisfacetofacesettlement==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${merchantcontrinforisregistry==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{merchantcontrinforlicensename}, #{merchantcontrinforlicensenumber}, #{merchantcontrinforlicenseacquisitiondate}, #{merchantreprinforfullnamekanji}, #{merchantreprinforfullnamekana}, #{merchantreprinforpostalcode}, #{merchantreprinforprefecturecode}, #{merchantreprinforaddress}, #{merchantreprinforphone}, #{merchantreprinforbirthday}, #{merchantreprinforsex}, #{merchantreprinformemo}, #{merchantstoreinforstorenamekanji}, #{merchantstoreinforstorenamehalfwidthkana}, #{merchantstoreinforstorenamealphabet}, #{merchantstoreinforpostalcode}, #{merchantstoreinforprefecturecode}, #{merchantstoreinforaddress}, #{merchantstoreinforaddresskana}, #{merchantstoreinforphone}, #{merchantstoreinformemo}, #{merchantdeliveryinfordate}, #{merchantdeliveryinforgakkencustomernumber}, #{merchantdeliveryinforname}, #{merchantdeliveryinforpostalcode}, #{merchantdeliveryinforprefecturecode}, #{merchantdeliveryinforaddress}, #{merchantdeliveryinforcontactname}, #{merchantdeliveryinforphone}, #{merchantdeliveryinformemo}, #{merchantpayinfonetbankaccount}, #{merchantpayinfoitabbankaccount}, #{merchantpayinfoname}, #{merchantpayinfopostalcode}, #{merchantpayinfoaddress1}, #{merchantpayinfoaddress2}, #{merchantpayinfocontactname}, #{merchantoperinforstartdate}, #{merchantoperinforacceptancedate}, #{merchantoperinforguaranteeenddate}, #{merchantoperinforcontractenddate}, #{merchantoperinformemo},#{invaliddate}, #{invalidreason}, #{invaliddetailreason}, #{syncedtime}, #{appcompanyid}, #{jpporganizationid})
mapper.update: UPDATE accountsync SET appcompany=#{appcompany}, affiliationstorenamealphabetic=#{affiliationstorenamealphabetic}, affiliationstorenamekana=#{affiliationstorenamekana}, affiliationstorenamekanji=#{affiliationstorenamekanji}, website=#{website}, keiri_no=#{keirino}, corporate_number=#{corporatenumber}, mertermno=#{mertermno}, iris_id=#{irisid}, merchantinfo_isrepresentative=${merchantinfoisrepresentative==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, merchantinfo_inquiryname=#{merchantinfoinquiryname}, merchantinfo_inquiryphone=#{merchantinfoinquiryphone}, merchantinfo_warningemail=#{merchantinfowarningemail}, merchantinfo_inquiryemail=#{merchantinfoinquiryemail}, merchantinfo_errorinquiryname=#{merchantinfoerrorinquiryname}, merchantinfo_errorinquiryphone=#{merchantinfoerrorinquiryphone}, merchantinfo_errorinquiryemail=#{merchantinfoerrorinquiryemail}, merchantinfo_erroraccountbank=#{merchantinfoerroraccountbank}, merchantinfo_erroraccountbranch=#{merchantinfoerroraccountbranch}, merchantinfo_erroraccounttype=#{merchantinfoerroraccounttype}, merchantinfo_erroraccountnumber=#{merchantinfoerroraccountnumber}, merchantinfo_erroraccountname=#{merchantinfoerroraccountname}, merchantinfo_erroraccountkana=#{merchantinfoerroraccountkana}, merchantinfo_serviceid=#{merchantinfoserviceid}, merchantinfo_paymentcontactname=#{merchantinfopaymentcontactname}, merchantinfo_remarks=#{merchantinforemarks}, merchantinfo_radename=#{merchantinforadename}, merchantinfo_postalcode=#{merchantinfopostalcode}, merchantinfo_prefecturecode=#{merchantinfoprefecturecode}, merchantinfo_address=#{merchantinfoaddress}, merchantinfo_addresskana=#{merchantinfoaddresskana}, merchantinfo_phonenumberhyphen=#{merchantinfophonenumberhyphen}, merchantinfo_contactname=#{merchantinfocontactname}, merchantinfo_contactemail=#{merchantinfocontactemail}, merchantinfo_meterlist=#{merchantinfometerlist}, merchantcontrinfor_applicationcars=#{merchantcontrinforapplicationcars}, merchantcontrinfor_tabletmodel=#{merchantcontrinfortabletmodel}, merchantcontrinfor_applicationdate=#{merchantcontrinforapplicationdate}, merchantcontrinfor_isfacetofacesettlement=${merchantcontrinforisfacetofacesettlement==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, merchantcontrinfor_isregistry=${merchantcontrinforisregistry==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, merchantcontrinfor_licensename=#{merchantcontrinforlicensename}, merchantcontrinfor_licensenumber=#{merchantcontrinforlicensenumber}, merchantcontrinfor_licenseacquisitiondate=#{merchantcontrinforlicenseacquisitiondate}, merchantreprinfor_fullnamekanji=#{merchantreprinforfullnamekanji}, merchantreprinfor_fullnamekana=#{merchantreprinforfullnamekana}, merchantreprinfor_postalcode=#{merchantreprinforpostalcode}, merchantreprinfor_prefecturecode=#{merchantreprinforprefecturecode}, merchantreprinfor_address=#{merchantreprinforaddress}, merchantreprinfor_phone=#{merchantreprinforphone}, merchantreprinfor_birthday=#{merchantreprinforbirthday}, merchantreprinfor_sex=#{merchantreprinforsex}, merchantreprinfor_memo=#{merchantreprinformemo}, merchantstoreinfor_storenamekanji=#{merchantstoreinforstorenamekanji}, merchantstoreinfor_storenamehalfwidthkana=#{merchantstoreinforstorenamehalfwidthkana}, merchantstoreinfor_storenamealphabet=#{merchantstoreinforstorenamealphabet}, merchantstoreinfor_postalcode=#{merchantstoreinforpostalcode}, merchantstoreinfor_prefecturecode=#{merchantstoreinforprefecturecode}, merchantstoreinfor_address=#{merchantstoreinforaddress}, merchantstoreinfor_addresskana=#{merchantstoreinforaddresskana}, merchantstoreinfor_phone=#{merchantstoreinforphone}, merchantstoreinfor_memo=#{merchantstoreinformemo}, merchantdeliveryinfor_date=#{merchantdeliveryinfordate}, merchantdeliveryinfor_gakkencustomernumber=#{merchantdeliveryinforgakkencustomernumber}, merchantdeliveryinfor_name=#{merchantdeliveryinforname}, merchantdeliveryinfor_postalcode=#{merchantdeliveryinforpostalcode}, merchantdeliveryinfor_prefecturecode=#{merchantdeliveryinforprefecturecode}, merchantdeliveryinfor_address=#{merchantdeliveryinforaddress}, merchantdeliveryinfor_contactname=#{merchantdeliveryinforcontactname}, merchantdeliveryinfor_phone=#{merchantdeliveryinforphone}, merchantdeliveryinfor_memo=#{merchantdeliveryinformemo}, merchantpayinfo_netbankaccount=#{merchantpayinfonetbankaccount}, merchantpayinfo_itabbankaccount=#{merchantpayinfoitabbankaccount}, merchantpayinfo_name=#{merchantpayinfoname}, merchantpayinfo_postalcode=#{merchantpayinfopostalcode}, merchantpayinfo_address1=#{merchantpayinfoaddress1}, merchantpayinfo_address2=#{merchantpayinfoaddress2}, merchantpayinfo_contactname=#{merchantpayinfocontactname}, merchantoperinfor_startdate=#{merchantoperinforstartdate}, merchantoperinfor_acceptancedate=#{merchantoperinforacceptancedate}, merchantoperinfor_guaranteeenddate=#{merchantoperinforguaranteeenddate}, merchantoperinfor_contractenddate=#{merchantoperinforcontractenddate}, merchantoperinfor_memo=#{merchantoperinformemo}, invaliddate=#{invaliddate}, invalidreason=#{invalidreason}, invaliddetailreason=#{invaliddetailreason}, syncedtime=#{syncedtime}, appcompanyid=#{appcompanyid}, jpporganizationid=#{jpporganizationid} WHERE sfid=#{sfid}
mapper.select:
SELECT a.sfid, a.sfid as accountSfid, a.appcompany, a.affiliationstorenamealphabetic, a.affiliationstorenamekana, a.affiliationstorenamekanji as affiliationstorenamekanji, a.website, a.keiri_no as keirino, a.corporate_number as corporatenumber, a.mertermno, a.iris_id as irisid, a.merchantinfo_isrepresentative as merchantinfoisrepresentative, a.merchantinfo_inquiryname as merchantinfoinquiryname, a.merchantinfo_inquiryphone as merchantinfoinquiryphone, a.merchantinfo_warningemail as merchantinfowarningemail, a.merchantinfo_inquiryemail as merchantinfoinquiryemail, a.merchantinfo_errorinquiryname as merchantinfoerrorinquiryname, a.merchantinfo_errorinquiryphone as merchantinfoerrorinquiryphone, a.merchantinfo_errorinquiryemail as merchantinfoerrorinquiryemail, a.merchantinfo_erroraccountbank as merchantinfoerroraccountbank, a.merchantinfo_erroraccountbranch as merchantinfoerroraccountbranch, a.merchantinfo_erroraccounttype as merchantinfoerroraccounttype, a.merchantinfo_erroraccountnumber as merchantinfoerroraccountnumber, a.merchantinfo_erroraccountname as merchantinfoerroraccountname, a.merchantinfo_erroraccountkana as merchantinfoerroraccountkana, a.merchantinfo_serviceid as merchantinfoserviceid, a.merchantinfo_paymentcontactname as merchantinfopaymentcontactname, a.merchantinfo_remarks as merchantinforemarks, a.merchantinfo_radename as merchantinforadename, a.merchantinfo_postalcode as merchantinfopostalcode, a.merchantinfo_prefecturecode as merchantinfoprefecturecode, a.merchantinfo_address as merchantinfoaddress, a.merchantinfo_addresskana as merchantinfoaddresskana, a.merchantinfo_phonenumberhyphen as merchantinfophonenumberhyphen, a.merchantinfo_contactname as merchantinfocontactname, a.merchantinfo_contactemail as merchantinfocontactemail, a.merchantinfo_meterlist as merchantinfometerlist, a.merchantcontrinfor_applicationcars as merchantcontrinforapplicationcars, a.merchantcontrinfor_tabletmodel as merchantcontrinfortabletmodel, a.merchantcontrinfor_applicationdate as merchantcontrinforapplicationdate, a.merchantcontrinfor_isfacetofacesettlement as merchantcontrinforisfacetofacesettlement, a.merchantcontrinfor_isregistry as merchantcontrinforisregistry, a.merchantcontrinfor_licensename as merchantcontrinforlicensename, a.merchantcontrinfor_licensenumber as merchantcontrinforlicensenumber, a.merchantcontrinfor_licenseacquisitiondate as merchantcontrinforlicenseacquisitiondate, a.merchantreprinfor_fullnamekanji as merchantreprinforfullnamekanji, a.merchantreprinfor_fullnamekana as merchantreprinforfullnamekana, a.merchantreprinfor_postalcode as merchantreprinforpostalcode, a.merchantreprinfor_prefecturecode as merchantreprinforprefecturecode, a.merchantreprinfor_address as merchantreprinforaddress, a.merchantreprinfor_phone as merchantreprinforphone, a.merchantreprinfor_birthday as merchantreprinforbirthday, a.merchantreprinfor_sex as merchantreprinforsex, a.merchantreprinfor_memo as merchantreprinformemo, a.merchantstoreinfor_storenamekanji as merchantstoreinforstorenamekanji, a.merchantstoreinfor_storenamehalfwidthkana as merchantstoreinforstorenamehalfwidthkana, a.merchantstoreinfor_storenamealphabet as merchantstoreinforstorenamealphabet, a.merchantstoreinfor_postalcode as merchantstoreinforpostalcode, a.merchantstoreinfor_prefecturecode as merchantstoreinforprefecturecode, a.merchantstoreinfor_address as merchantstoreinforaddress, a.merchantstoreinfor_addresskana as merchantstoreinforaddresskana, a.merchantstoreinfor_phone as merchantstoreinforphone, a.merchantstoreinfor_memo as merchantstoreinformemo, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_date as merchantdeliveryinfordate, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_gakkencustomernumber as merchantdeliveryinforgakkencustomernumber, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_name as merchantdeliveryinforname, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_postalcode as merchantdeliveryinforpostalcode, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_prefecturecode as merchantdeliveryinforprefecturecode, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_address as merchantdeliveryinforaddress, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_contactname as merchantdeliveryinforcontactname, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_phone as merchantdeliveryinforphone, a.merchantdeliveryinfor_memo as merchantdeliveryinformemo, a.merchantpayinfo_name as merchantpayinfoname, a.merchantpayinfo_postalcode as merchantpayinfopostalcode, a.merchantpayinfo_address1 as merchantpayinfoaddress1, a.merchantpayinfo_address2 as merchantpayinfoaddress2, concat(a.merchantpayinfo_address1, a.merchantpayinfo_address2) as companypaymentaddress, a.merchantpayinfo_contactname as merchantpayinfocontactname, a.merchantoperinfor_startdate as merchantoperinforstartdate, a.merchantoperinfor_acceptancedate as merchantoperinforacceptancedate, a.merchantoperinfor_guaranteeenddate as merchantoperinforguaranteeenddate, a.merchantoperinfor_contractenddate as merchantoperinforcontractenddate, a.merchantoperinfor_memo as merchantoperinformemo, a.invaliddate, a.invalidreason, a.invaliddetailreason, a.appcompanyid as appcompanyid, a.jpporganizationid, a.merchantinfo_prefecturecode as prefecturecode, payment.linepaychannelid as channelId, payment.linepaychannelsecret as channelsecret, payment.aupaystoreid as aupaystoreid, payment.serviceid as serviceid, payment.tofacemerchantid as tofacemerchantid, payment.nontofacemerchantid as nontofacemerchantid, payment.tofacehashkey, payment.nontofacehashkey, payment.tofaceencryptkey, payment.nontofaceencryptkey, payment.tofaceencryptiv, payment.nontofaceencryptiv, payment.tofacebasicauthid as tofacebasicauthid, payment.nontofacebasicauthid, payment.tofacebasicauthpassword, payment.nontofacebasicauthpassword, payment.tofacecardtype, payment.nontofacecardtype, payment.tofacepaymentrouteid, payment.nontofacepaymentrouteid, bm.bankcode as paymentbankcode, bm.BranchCode as paymentbranchcode, bm.banknamekana as paymentbanknamekana, bm.branchnamekana as paymentbranchnamekana, bankacc.accounttype as paymentdeposittype, bankacc.accountnumber as paymentaccountno, bankacc.accountnamekana as paymentdepositor,
netpaybm.bankcode as netpaybankcode, netpaybm.BranchCode as netpaybranchcode, netpaybm.banknamekana as netpaybanknamekana, netpaybm.branchnamekana as netpaybranchnamekana, netpaybankacc.accounttype as netpaydeposittype, netpaybankacc.accountnumber as netpaypaymentaccountno, netpaybankacc.accountnamekana as netpaydepositor, netpaybankacc.accountnamekana as netpayaccountnamekana, netpaybankacc.accounttype as netpayAccountType FROM accountsync a LEFT JOIN paymentsystemlinkinforsync payment ON a.sfid = payment.internetpaymerstore LEFT JOIN bankaccountinformationsync bankacc ON a.sfid = bankacc.account AND bankacc.accountcategory = 'ITAB決済支払' LEFT JOIN bankmastersync bm ON bankacc.accountbank = bm.sfid
LEFT JOIN bankaccountinformationsync netpaybankacc ON a.sfid = netpaybankacc.account AND netpaybankacc.accountcategory = 'ネット決済支払' LEFT JOIN bankmastersync netpaybm ON netpaybankacc.accountbank = netpaybm.sfid WHERE a.appcompany=#{appCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND a.appcompanyid is not null ORDER BY a.sfid DESC

SELECT bank.account, bm.banknamekana as bankNameKana, bm.bankcode as bankCode, bm.branchnamekana AS branchNameKana, bm.branchcode as branchCode, bank.accountname as accountName, bank.accountnumber AS accountNumber, bank.accountnamekana AS accountNameKana, bank.accountcategory as accountCategory, bank.accounttype as accountType FROM bankaccountinformationsync bank INNER JOIN bankmastersync bm ON bank.accountbank = bm.sfid WHERE bank.account=#{accountSfid}

SELECT acc.sfid as accsfid, acc.affiliationstorenamealphabetic as affiliationStoreNameAlphabetic, acc.affiliationstorenamekana, acc.affiliationstorenamekanji, acc.website, acc.keiri_no, acc.corporate_number, acc.mertermno, acc.iris_id, acc.merchantinfo_isrepresentative, acc.merchantinfo_inquiryname, acc.merchantinfo_inquiryphone, acc.merchantinfo_warningemail, acc.merchantinfo_inquiryemail, acc.merchantinfo_errorinquiryname, acc.merchantinfo_errorinquiryphone, acc.merchantinfo_errorinquiryemail, acc.merchantinfo_erroraccountbank, acc.merchantinfo_erroraccountbranch, acc.merchantinfo_erroraccounttype, acc.merchantinfo_erroraccountnumber, acc.merchantinfo_erroraccountname, acc.merchantinfo_erroraccountkana, acc.merchantinfo_serviceid, acc.merchantinfo_paymentcontactname, acc.merchantinfo_remarks as merchantinforemarks, acc.merchantinfo_radename as merchantinforadename, acc.merchantinfo_postalcode, acc.merchantinfo_prefecturecode, acc.merchantinfo_address, acc.merchantinfo_addresskana, acc.merchantinfo_phonenumberhyphen, acc.merchantinfo_contactname, acc.merchantinfo_contactemail, acc.merchantinfo_meterlist, acc.merchantcontrinfor_applicationcars, acc.merchantcontrinfor_tabletmodel, COALESCE(to_char(acc.merchantcontrinfor_applicationdate, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS'), '') AS merchantcontrinfor_applicationdate, acc.merchantcontrinfor_isfacetofacesettlement, acc.merchantcontrinfor_isregistry, acc.merchantcontrinfor_licensename, acc.merchantcontrinfor_licensenumber, COALESCE(to_char(acc.merchantcontrinfor_licenseacquisitiondate, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '') AS merchantcontrinfor_licenseacquisitiondate, acc.merchantreprinfor_fullnamekanji, acc.merchantreprinfor_fullnamekana, acc.merchantreprinfor_postalcode, acc.merchantreprinfor_prefecturecode, acc.merchantreprinfor_address, acc.merchantreprinfor_phone, to_char(acc.merchantreprinfor_birthday, '‎YYYY/MM/DD') as merchantreprinfor_birthday, acc.merchantreprinfor_sex, acc.merchantreprinfor_memo, acc.merchantstoreinfor_storenamekanji, acc.merchantstoreinfor_storenamehalfwidthkana, acc.merchantstoreinfor_storenamealphabet, acc.merchantstoreinfor_postalcode, acc.merchantstoreinfor_prefecturecode, acc.merchantstoreinfor_address, acc.merchantstoreinfor_addresskana, acc.merchantstoreinfor_phone, acc.merchantstoreinfor_memo, to_char(acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_date, '‎YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') as merchantdeliveryinfor_date, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_gakkencustomernumber, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_name, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_postalcode, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_prefecturecode, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_address, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_contactname, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_phone, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_memo, acc.merchantpayinfo_name, acc.merchantpayinfo_postalcode, acc.merchantpayinfo_address1, acc.merchantpayinfo_address2, acc.merchantpayinfo_contactname, to_char(acc.merchantoperinfor_startdate, '‎YYYY/MM/DD') as merchantoperinfor_startdate, to_char(acc.merchantoperinfor_acceptancedate, '‎YYYY/MM/DD') as merchantoperinfor_acceptancedate, to_char(acc.merchantoperinfor_guaranteeenddate, '‎YYYY/MM/DD') as merchantoperinfor_guaranteeenddate, to_char(acc.merchantoperinfor_contractenddate, '‎YYYY/MM/DD') as merchantoperinfor_contractenddate, acc.merchantoperinfor_memo, acc.appcompanyid, acc.jpporganizationid, netBankAccount.sfid as netsfid, bmNetBankAccount.bankname as netbankname, bmNetBankAccount.branchnamekana as netbranchnamekana, netBankAccount.accountname as netaccountname, bmNetBankAccount.banknamekana as netbanknamekana, bmNetBankAccount.bankcode as netbankcode, bmNetBankAccount.branchcode as netbranchcode, netBankAccount.accountnumber as netaccountnumber, netBankAccount.accountnamekana as netaccountnamekana, netBankAccount.accounttype as netaccounttype, itabBankAccount.sfid as itabsfid, bmItabBankAccount.bankname as itab, bmItabBankAccount.branchnamekana as itabbranchnamekana, itabBankAccount.accountname as itabaccountname, bmItabBankAccount.banknamekana as itabbanknamekana, bmItabBankAccount.bankcode as itabbankcode, bmItabBankAccount.branchcode as itabbranchcode, itabBankAccount.accountnumber as itabaccountnumber, itabBankAccount.accountnamekana as itabaccountnamekana, itabBankAccount.accounttype as itabaccounttype, payment.linepaychannelid as linepaychannelid, payment.linepaychannelsecret, payment.aupaystoreid, payment.serviceid, payment.tofacemerchantid, payment.nontofacemerchantid, payment.tofacehashkey, payment.nontofacehashkey, payment.tofaceencryptkey, payment.nontofaceencryptkey, payment.tofaceencryptiv, payment.nontofaceencryptiv, payment.tofacebasicauthid, payment.nontofacebasicauthid, payment.tofacebasicauthpassword, payment.nontofacebasicauthpassword, payment.tofacecardtype, payment.nontofacecardtype, payment.tofacepaymentrouteid, payment.nontofacepaymentrouteid, payment.sfid as paymentsfid FROM account acc LEFT JOIN bankaccountinformation netBankAccount ON acc.sfid = netBankAccount.account AND netBankAccount.accountcategory = 'ネット決済支払' LEFT JOIN bankaccountinformation itabBankAccount ON acc.sfid = itabBankAccount.account AND itabBankAccount.accountcategory = 'ITAB決済支払' LEFT JOIN bankmaster bmNetBankAccount ON netBankAccount.accountbank = bmNetBankAccount.sfid LEFT JOIN bankmaster bmItabBankAccount ON itabBankAccount.accountbank = bmItabBankAccount.sfid LEFT JOIN paymentsystemlinkinfor payment ON acc.sfid = payment.internetpaymerstore WHERE acc.sfid=#{sfid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
